en: Throughout middle school, I was the victim of a couple stolen phones.
ko: 중학교 내내 나는 핸드폰을 몇 번이나 도둑맞았어.

en: Kids were just ruthless.
But this one time, my phone got stolen...
And I managed to find the person who took it.
And when he gave it back to me, my mom made me give him $20 for his honesty.
ko: 그래서 걔가 돌려줬을 때, 우리 엄마가 정직한 행동에 대한 보상으로 20달러를 주라고 했어.

en: And word started spreading like wildfire.
"Hey, if you steal Jorge's phone and give it back, he gives you $20!"
Duuuuude!
I had a target on my back.
"It's the $20 phone kid!"
"Oh wait, that's him!"
Interesting.
And during lunch, I felt all of these kids talking about me, and planning on how to take my phone.
ko: 점심시간에 애들이 다 나에 대해 얘기하는 게 느껴졌어. 내 폰을 어떻게 가져갈지 계획하면서.

en: So I had to come up with a counter plan.
I got a calculator I had, and I put it in my back pocket.
ko: 가지고 있던 계산기를 꺼내서 뒷주머니에 넣었어.

en: So from a distance, it looked like I had a phone that was ready to fall out of my pocket.
ko: 멀리서 보면 폰이 주머니에서 떨어질 것처럼 보였어.

en: And not even two minutes in the hall after lunch... FOOP!
ko: 점심 끝나고 복도에서 2분도 안 됐는데... 휙!

en: Some guy snatched my calculator and ran off!
ko: 어떤 애가 내 계산기를 낚아채서 도망갔어!

en: What the...
Focus on your schoolwork, not stealing phones!
ko: 폰 훔칠 생각 말고 공부나 해!
